channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Indiana primaries show the political cost of crossing Trump: ANALYSIS
item.description: The message from Indiana’s Republican primaries was hard to miss: if you cross Trump -- even in a state legislative race -- he’s willing to come after...

item.title: Rubio faces challenge in Pope Leo meeting after Trump's criticism over Iran
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is visiting the Vatican to mend ties after President Donald Trump’s criticisms of Pope Leo XIV and the U.S.-Israel...

item.title: Lawsuits allege negligence by UPS , others before fiery, fatal November crash
item.description: A slew of new civil lawsuits allege UPS and its partners failed their responsibility to make sure a plane they put in the air was safe to fly.

item.title: Agents can kill bears from the air to protect Alaska caribou, judge says
item.description: The Mulchatna caribou herd is expected to begin calving soon, and the babies are particularly susceptible to being eaten by bears or wolves.
